STM32 flash programming modules and classes for STM32F4 and STM32F7 microcontrollers.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Imports STM32F4FlashProgrammer and STM32F7FlashProgrammer modules.
- **[stm32.py](stm32.py.md)**: STM32 flash programming and core control functionalities for Pebble firmware.
- **[stm32f4.py](stm32f4.py.md)**: Defines the STM32F4FlashProgrammer class for programming STM32F4 microcontrollers.
- **[stm32f7.py](stm32f7.py.md)**: Implements STM32F7 flash programming with specific IDCODE, CPUID, and flash sector sizes.
